description_long: This is a rectangular, open-sided storage crate or shelf constructed from weathered, light brown wooden planks. The structure consists of three horizontal slats on each long side, with two vertical supports at each corner, creating a sturdy frame. The planks show signs of age and use, with visible stains and a slightly rough, matte finish. The open design allows for easy access and visibility of contents from all sides, making it suitable for storing or displaying items in urban environments such as markets, garages, or workshops. The interior is spacious and unobstructed, with no shelves or dividers, maximizing its utility as a general-purpose receptacle. The overall appearance is utilitarian and rustic, blending functionality with a simple, industrial aesthetic.
description: A rectangular, open-sided wooden crate or shelf with weathered planks and a rustic, utilitarian appearance. It features three horizontal slats per side and is designed for accessible storage or display.
description_view_0: The long side of the crate is visible, showing three horizontal wooden slats and the open interior.
description_view_1: The short end of the crate is shown, highlighting the vertical supports and the depth of the open interior.
description_view_2: The opposite long side is visible, mirroring the three horizontal slats and open structure seen in view 0.
description_view_3: The opposite short end is shown, again displaying the vertical supports and open access.
